views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing current caffeine in system with decay curve, today's cup count and caffeine total, daily limit progress ring, and a quick-add floating button

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal with drink type picker showing icons, size selector, auto-calculated caffeine with manual override stepper, time picker defaulting to now, and decaf toggle

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap colored by caffeine intensity per day, tappable to show that day's drink list with type icons, times, and caffeine amounts

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly caffeine trend chart, consumption-by-hour bar chart showing peak times, drink type distribution pie chart, and computed insights about habits

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCupCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of coffee entries logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCaffeineMg
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of caffeine mg from all entries today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentCaffeineInSystem
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Estimated caffeine still active in body using 5-hour half-life decay: sum of each entry's caffeine * pow(0.5, hoursElapsed / 5.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily caffeine goal consumed (todayCaffeineMg / dailyGoalMg), capped at 1.0 for progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days where total caffeine stayed at or below the daily goal (400mg default)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageCups
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average cups per day over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageCaffeine
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily caffeine mg over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekOverWeekTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in average daily caffeine: (thisWeekAvg - lastWeekAvg) / lastWeekAvg * 100

viewModelComputedProperties.name: peakConsumptionHour
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hour of day (0-23) with the highest total caffeine intake across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: timeSinceLastCoffee
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Seconds elapsed since the most recent coffee entry's timestamp

viewModelComputedProperties.name: caffeineByHourData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of 24 data points (one per hour) with average caffeine consumed at that hour, for the consumption-by-hour bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyTrendData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of daily total caffeine values for the last 30 days, for the weekly trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: drinkTypeDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dictionary mapping drink type display names to their count over the last 30 days, for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: daysOverLimit
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of days in the last 30 where total caffeine exceeded the daily goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Computed list of contextual insights: over-limit warnings, streak milestones, peak hour observation, caffeine-free window length, week-over-week change alert

dailyGoal.description: FDA-recommended maximum daily caffeine intake. Progress ring fills as user approaches limit. Ring turns yellow at 75% and red at 100%.

caffeineDefaults.description: Auto-populated caffeine mg when user selects drink type + size. Espresso: 63/63/126/126. Drip: 95/145/195/235. Latte: 63/63/126/126. Cappuccino: 63/63/126/126. Americano: 63/95/126/126. ColdBrew: 100/150/200/260. PourOver: 95/145/195/235. Mocha: 63/95/126/126. Macchiato: 63/63/126/126. Other: 80/120/160/200. User can always override via stepper.

halfLifeDecay.description: Caffeine half-life is approximately 5 hours. Current caffeine in system = sum of (entryMg * pow(0.5, hoursElapsed / 5.0)) for all entries in last 24 hours. Displayed as a decay curve on dashboard.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as 'within goal' if total caffeine ≤ dailyGoalMg. Streak increments for each consecutive day within goal. Days with zero entries count as within goal (0 ≤ 400). Streak resets when any day exceeds the limit.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare this week's (Mon-Sun) average daily caffeine against last week's. Show percentage change with up/down arrow. Also track 30-day moving average to identify long-term reduction or increase patterns.

sleepCutoff.description: If user logs coffee after 2 PM, show a gentle insight noting that caffeine consumed after 2 PM may still be active at bedtime (at 10 PM, 8 hours later, ~33% of caffeine remains).

insights: Over-limit alert: 'You've exceeded 400mg today — consider switching to decaf'
Streak milestone: 'Nice! 7 days in a row under your caffeine goal'
Peak hour: 'Most of your caffeine is consumed between 8-10 AM'
Late caffeine warning: 'Your 3 PM espresso still has ~40mg active at bedtime'
Week-over-week: 'Your caffeine intake is down 15% from last week'
Caffeine-free window: 'Your longest caffeine-free stretch today is 6 hours'
Drink diversity: 'You've had 4 different drink types this week'
Moderation trend: 'Your 30-day average is trending down — great progress!'
